channel.title: NPR Topics: Technology
channel.description: Latest technology news and breakthroughs in technology, science, and industry. Download the NPR Technology podcast and Technology RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Will.i.am wants to future-proof a new generation
item.description: The Black Eyed Peas co-founder turned entrepreneur is now teaching a class on "agentic AI" for Arizona State.
item.content:encoded:
The Black Eyed Peas co-founder turned entrepreneur is now teaching a class on "agentic AI" for Arizona State.

(Image credit: Emily Choi)
item.dc:creator: Chloe Veltman

item.title: In real-world test, an AI model did better than ER doctors at diagnosing patients
item.description: Researchers evaluated how well an AI model could diagnose and make decisions about patient care.
item.content:encoded:
Researchers evaluated how well an AI model could diagnose and make decisions about patient care.

(Image credit: shapecharge/E+)
item.dc:creator: Will Stone

item.title: Elon Musk accuses OpenAI's leaders of 'looting the nonprofit' in court testimony
item.description: In his second day on the stand in the trial he launched against OpenAI, Elon Musk said the AI start-up he'd helped found had strayed from its charitable mission.
item.content:encoded:
In his second day on the stand in the trial he launched against OpenAI, Elon Musk said the AI start-up he'd helped found had strayed from its charitable mission.

(Image credit: Godofredo A. Vásquez)
item.dc:creator: John Ruwitch

item.title: Families sue OpenAI over Canadian mass shooter's use of ChatGPT
item.description: The lawsuits claim OpenAI was negligent for failing to report the shooter to authorities after her account was flagged for "gun violence activity and planning."
item.content:encoded:
The lawsuits claim OpenAI was negligent for failing to report the shooter to authorities after her account was flagged for "gun violence activity and planning."

(Image credit: Paige Taylor White)
item.dc:creator: Geoff Brumfiel

item.title: EU says Meta is failing to keep underage users off Facebook and Instagram
item.description: The European Union accused Meta on Wednesday of failing to stop underage users from accessing Facebook and Instagram, in violation of the bloc's digital rules that require sites to protect minors.
item.content:encoded:
The European Union accused Meta on Wednesday of failing to stop underage users from accessing Facebook and Instagram, in violation of the bloc's digital rules that require sites to protect minors.

(Image credit: Jeff Chiu)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Australia moves to tax Meta, Google and TikTok to fund newsrooms
item.description: Australia is proposing to tax Meta, Google and TikTok a proportion of their revenue to pay for news reporters. The government intends to introduce the draft legislation to Parliament by July.
item.content:encoded:
Australia is proposing to tax Meta, Google and TikTok a proportion of their revenue to pay for news reporters. The government intends to introduce the draft legislation to Parliament by July.

(Image credit: Rick Rycroft)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Elon Musk testifies against OpenAI, seeking Sam Altman's ouster
item.description: Musk's lawyers say OpenAI leaders "stole a charity" and Musk warns about the potential dangers of AI: "We don't want to have a Terminator outcome."
item.content:encoded:
Musk's lawyers say OpenAI leaders "stole a charity" and Musk warns about the potential dangers of AI: "We don't want to have a Terminator outcome."

(Image credit: Godofredo A. Vásquez)
item.dc:creator: John Ruwitch

item.title: Michel Martin speaks to author of new book on Elon Musk
item.description: NPR's Michel Martin speaks with Quinn Slobodian, the co-author of the new book, "Muskism: A Guide to the Perplexed."
item.content:encoded: NPR's Michel Martin speaks with Quinn Slobodian, the co-author of the new book, "Muskism: A Guide to the Perplexed."
item.dc:creator: Michel Martin

item.title: Pompeii archaeologists use AI to reconstruct man killed in volcano's eruption
item.description: Archaeologists have used AI for the first time to digitally reconstruct the face of a man killed in the AD 79 eruption of Mount Vesuvius, offering a new way to understand one of history's most famous natural disasters.
item.content:encoded:
Archaeologists have used AI for the first time to digitally reconstruct the face of a man killed in the AD 79 eruption of Mount Vesuvius, offering a new way to understand one of history's most famous natural disasters.

(Image credit: AP)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: China blocks Meta from acquiring AI startup Manus
item.description: Meta said Monday that the transaction "complied fully with applicable law" and that it anticipates "an appropriate resolution to the inquiry."
item.content:encoded:
Meta said Monday that the transaction "complied fully with applicable law" and that it anticipates "an appropriate resolution to the inquiry."

(Image credit: Jeff Chiu/AP)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
